title: The Nuke Mod
description: This mod adds nuclear bombs, explosives and many other stuff to Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds nuclear bombs, explosives and many other things to Minecraft 1.18.2! You can use bombs to destroy villages!

The Nuke Mod is available at Aternos now!

Nukes give players radiation or advanced radiation effects. Destroys a specific area.

Everything this mod adds:

Nuke: A simple nuclear bomb.

Detonator: Used to detonate bombs.

Uranium: Used for most of the recipes. Spawn rates are similar to gold.

Grass Landmine: Explodes when someone walks into it.

C4: A TNT with 8 explosion power.

Time Bomb: Takes a long time to explode.

Wire Cutter: Used to defuse landmines and time bombs.

Potion Grenade: A stackable grenade that explodes when hit a block. It's similar to a Splash poison to fit Minecraft theme.

Thermobaric Bomb: A mini–Nuclear bomb.

Tsar Bomb: The most powerful bomb in the mod. May create significant lag.

Nuke Painting: A 1x1 painting with a nuke icon.

Alarm Disc Air Raid: An air raid siren in a disc.

Nuke With Model: Same as the Nuke but has a custom model.

Dud: A nuke that failed to explode. Still dangerous. Uses the same model as the "Nuke With Model" but uses exposed copper texture.

Nuke Caller: Calls a nuke from sky.

Airstrike Caller: Calls 10 small bombs from sky.

Nuclear Catapult: Similar to a crossbow, uses nukes as ammo.

Nuclear Waste Fluid: Simply lava but with a green texture.

Fire Bomb: Gives medium damage and starts fire.

Smoke Bomb: Instantly explodes when detonated. Gives blindness.

Fat Man: A powerful nuke with a custom model. The only nuke uses plutonium. Now with the new cool model.

Plutonium: Used to craft Fat Man. Now it has a block!

Obsidian Door: A door made with obsidian. Immune to explosions and activated by Redstone.

Molotov Cocktail: Similar to Potion Grenade but starts fire when exploded.

Stone Landmine: Same as Grass Landmine but has stone texture.

Diamond Bomb Trap: It has a diamond texture and explodes when mined.

Gas Mask: Blocks Phosphorus effect.

Debug Item: Only accessible using commands. I made it for myself to test new functions. 

Mining Charge: Drops all blocks nearby when exploded.

Nuclear Waste Barrel: A decoration block.

Phosphorus Bomb: It gives a special effect called as "White Phosphorus". It makes you drown. You can protect yourself with a gas mask.

Cluster: Used to make cluster bomb.

Cluster Bomb: Throws some explosive clusters to player.

Anti-Radiation: Removes radiation and advanced radiation effects. It's so hard to get this item.

You may want to download this mod if you want to destroy cities or villages. Also, this mod has some vanilla feel. Models are cubic and most of the bombs are simply blocks.

Important Information:

This mod needs to be installed on both server side and client side if you are playing this on a server.

Wire Cutter does not defuse time bombs on creative mode.

Explosions may create some lag on servers with low RAM.
